info.name: Billing Software Authentication API
info.description: Complete authentication API collection for frontend integration testing

request.description: Register a new user account
Login with email and password
Get currently authenticated user
Refresh access token using refresh token
Change password for authenticated user
Request password reset token
Reset password using reset token
Verify email address using verification token
Logout current user
Register a new client (customer) account
Get current client's profile (requires client role)
Update current client's profile
Get all clients (requires admin/staff role)
Get specific client by ID (requires admin/staff role)
Get client by numeric client ID (requires admin/staff role)
Get current user's profile
Update current user's profile
Get all users (requires admin role)
Create a new cPanel account (Admin only)
Suspend a cPanel account (Admin only)
Unsuspend a cPanel account (Admin only)
Terminate a cPanel account (Admin only)
Change cPanel account password (Admin only)
Change cPanel account package/plan (Admin only)
Get cPanel account summary (Admin only)
Verify cPanel username availability (Admin only)
Retrieve all configured Top-Level Domains (TLDs) with their features and full pricing matrix across multiple currencies (USD, BDT, etc.).
Configure a new TLD with pricing Detail for different durations (1-3 years) and multiple currencies (USD, BDT). (Admin only)
Get detailed configuration for a specific TLD using its extension (e.g., .com, .net).
Retrieve TLD details using its MongoDB internal ID. (Admin only)
Update TLD settings, status, or pricing Detail. (Admin only)
Permanently remove a TLD configuration. (Admin only)
Check if a domain name is available for registration. Returns pricing in configured currencies if available.
Initiate domain registration. Requires authenticated client session.
Initiate domain transfer from another registrar using an Auth/EPP code.
Retrieve comprehensive Information about a registered domain, including expiry, nameservers, and locks.
Extend the registration period of an existing domain.
Modify the nameservers (NS records) for a registered domain.
Simulated call for success handling
Simulated call for failure handling
Simulated call for cancel handling
Simulated IPN call
Create a new product/hosting package (Admin only)
Get all products with optional filtering and pagination (Admin only)
Get a specific product by ID (Admin only)

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Business Hosting Plan Pro",
  "description": "Updated description with enhanced features",
  "features": [
    "20 GB SSD Storage",
    "Unlimited Bandwidth",
    "Free SSL Certificate",
    "cPanel Control Panel",
    "Daily Backups",
    "24/7 Priority Support",
    "Free CDN"
  ]
}

request.description: Update an existing product (Admin only)
Delete a product (Admin only)
Show/hide product from customers (Admin only)
Search products by name or description (Admin only)

variable.description: Product type: hosting, vps, domain, ssl

request.description: Get all products of a specific type (Admin only)
Get all products in a specific group (Admin only)

query.description: Optional: Filter by service type (HOSTING, DOMAIN, VPS, EMAIL, LICENSE)

request.description: Get all services for a specific client
Get detailed information about a specific service for a client
Admin action to suspend a running service
Admin action to unsuspend/restore a suspended service
Admin action to permanently terminate a service
Admin action to retry failed provisioning for a service

header.description: Optional: Only needed for logged-in users

request.description: Submit a new order. The payload supports 'client.type' as 'new' (with account details) or 'existing' (with clientId). Domain action can be 'use-owned', 'register', or 'transfer'.
Get all orders for the currently authenticated user
Get comprehensive details of a specific order including items, provisioning jobs, and child services
Create a new manual invoice (Admin/Staff only)

query.description: Filter by status: PAID, UNPAID, CANCELLED, REFUNDED, COLLECTION

request.description: Retrieve list of invoices with pagination and optional filters

variable.description: Can be the MongoDB ObjectId or the explicit Invoice Number (e.g. INV-1234)

request.description: Retrieve a specific invoice by its internal ID or explicit Invoice Number
Manually update an invoice status (e.g. marking it PAID bypasses webhook). Admin/Staff only.

query.description: Filter strictly by QUEUED, RUNNING, SUCCESS, FAILED

request.description: View background processing queue states for Order Fulfillments
Force a queued retry of a specific failed provision

query.description: Filter strictly by QUEUED, RUNNING, SUCCESS, FAILED

request.description: View backend jobs for remote Suspend, Unsuspend, or Terminate acts
Force retry remote provider suspends/unsuspends that timed out or dropped
Force trigger the physical Provisioning Loop natively instead of waiting for setTimeout
Force trigger the physical Remote Action Loop sequentially
Force invoice generation logic testing.
Force checks against the 5-Day unpaid grace limit natively suspending accounts.
Force systemic emails/sms reminders looping
Permanently destruct accounts suspended for over 30 days securely
